final_decision.exact_quote: Visit our Lost or Stolen card page – if the identity theft involves your Visa card – to learn how to cancel your card or get an emergency replacement card.
final_decision.response: If your identity has been stolen, you should visit the Lost or Stolen card page to learn how to cancel your card or get an emergency replacement card if the theft involves your Visa card.
